title: FakeGamerG 1.2k texturepack
description: A clean pvp and Smp texture pack
body: Welcome to the definitive 1.21.x resource pack experience, meticulously crafted and optimized by FakeGamerG (also known as FakeStarG). Designed for players who refuse to compromise between high-stakes PvP performance and the immersive beauty of an SMP (Survival Multi-Player) world, this pack is the culmination of technical precision and aesthetic style.
